zh.lifeSummary: 當Eilika Billung von Sachsen於1081年出生時，她的父親Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen37歲，母親Sophia of Hungary33歲。她於大約1094年與Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1143年1月16日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年62歲，埋葬在瑞典達拉納可洛斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eilika Billung von Sachsen于1081年出生时，她的父亲Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen37岁，母亲Sophia of Hungary33岁。她于大约1094年与Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1143年1月16日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年62岁，埋葬在瑞典達拉納可洛斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Billung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Billing, derived from Old English bil ‘sword’, or a habitational name from Great and Little Billing in Northamptonshire, meaning ‘(settlement of) the followers (Old English -ingas) of a man called Bill(a) or Bȳdel’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, formed with a cognate of Old Saxon bīl ‘sword’.
Danish and Norwegian: from an Old Danish personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Billings
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Billing , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belling
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Belling, in Pomerania, Baden, Hesse, Thuringia, and elsewhere.

English (Devon): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Belling, Beling, of uncertain origin (perhaps from Old English Bǣdling, an original nickname from bǣdling ‘effeminate man’). Alternatively, a variant of Billing .

variants.name: Billinger
meanings: German: from the personal name   Billing   2.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

historicEvents.title: Vreta Abbey is First Christian Convent
historicEvents.description: Vreta Abbey was established around 1100 and was the first Christian convent in Sweden. It was located in modern-day Linkoping Municipality. It was founded on orders of Pope Paschal II with large donations by King Inge the Elder and Queen Helena.

en.lifeSummary: When Eilika Billung von Sachsen was born in 1081, her father, Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen, was 37 and her mother, Sophia of Hungary, was 33. She married Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt about 1094. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 January 1143, in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Kloster, Dalarna, Sweden.

fr.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eilika Billung von Sachsen est née en 1081, son père, Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sophia of Hungary, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt environ 1094. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1143, à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Kloster, Dalarna, Suède.

de.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Eilika Billung von Sachsen 1081 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen 37 und ihre Mutter Sophia of Hungary 33. Sie hat um 1094 Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1143 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Kloster, Dalarna, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eilika Billung von Sachsen è nata il nel 1081, sua padre, Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Sophia of Hungary, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt circa 1094. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 gennaio 1143, nel Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Kloster, Dalarna, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eilika Billung von Sachsenが1081年に生まれた時，父Magnus I. Billung von Sachsenは37歳，母Sophia of Hungaryは33歳であった。約1094年にOtto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1143年1月16日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトで62歳で死去し，スウェーデンダラーナクロスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 허초그투 로버그 슈나켄베크
ko.lifeSummary: Eilika Billung von Sachsen(이)가 1081년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophia of Hungary(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1094년 Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 1월 16일 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 다라른아 클로스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eilika Billung von Sachsen nasceu em 1081, seu pai, Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sophia of Hungary, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt aproximadamente 1094. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1143, em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Kloster, Dalarna, Suécia.

ru.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: щнеикенбек, крис хирзогтум лауенбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eilika Billung von Sachsen родилась в 1081 г., её отцу по имени Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia of Hungary, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt около 1094 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 января 1143 г. в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности клостир, даларна, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eilika Billung von Sachsen nació en 1081, su papá, Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sophia of Hungary, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt aproximadamente 1094. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de enero de 1143, en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Kloster, Dalarna, Suecia.
